item.title: Breaking: Major Market Crash Sends Stocks Down 5%
item.description: Global markets experienced a significant downturn today as investors reacted to unexpected economic data.
item.content:encoded: Global markets experienced a significant downturn today as investors reacted to unexpected economic data. The S&P 500 dropped 5% in early trading.

item.title: Quarterly Earnings Report: Tech Giants Beat Expectations
item.description: Several major tech companies reported better-than-expected quarterly earnings.

item.title: Federal Reserve Signals Rate Decision
item.description: The Federal Reserve indicated its upcoming interest rate decision at the next FOMC meeting.
